shows.title: Andha Yug
shows.tagline: A war leaves no one innocent
shows.description: Dharamvir Bharati's timeless verse play on the last day of the Mahabharata war — reimagined with live percussion and shadow work.

shows.title: Chandni Raatein
shows.description: An original musical woven from ghazals of the 1940s — two poets, one radio station, and a partition that separates more than land.

shows.title: The Last Monsoon
shows.description: A new play about a fishing village, a vanishing coastline, and the family that refuses to leave. Winner — META Best New Script.
